transcript:
CALLER: Hi, mujhe ek appointment chahiye. Dermatology ke liye.
AGENT: Bilkul, aap sahi jagah call kiye hain. Aapka naam aur contact number bata sakte hain?
CALLER: Rahul Patankar. Number hai 9765432100.
AGENT: Thank you Rahul ji. Dermatology mein Dr. Sneha Kulkarni available hain. Aapko kab convenient hai — weekday ya weekend?
CALLER: Weekday theek hai, actually Saturday bhi chalega agar ho toh.
AGENT: Saturday ko Dr. Kulkarni 11 AM se 1 PM tak available hain. Koi specific time preferred hai?
CALLER: 11:30 ho sakta hai?
AGENT: Haan, 11:30 AM Saturday ko book kar diya Rahul ji. SMS confirmation aayega aapke number pe. Kuch aur help chahiye?
CALLER: Nahi, bas itna hi. Thank you!
